name: HC SemiTek Corporation
summary: HC SemiTek Corporation researches, develops, produces, and sells light emitting diode (LED) epitaxial wafers and chips in China. It offers full color series of LED wafer and chips used in full-color LED display screens, back light, illumination, etc. The company also provides monocrystalline sapphire, sapphire substrate, and other sapphire window materials; and integrated magnetic sensor and magnetic module solutions. The company was formerly known as Wuhan HC SemiTek Co., Ltd and changed its name to HC SemiTek Corporation. HC SemiTek Corporation was founded in 2005 and is based in Wuhan, China.
